page_description: A curated distro of records, clothes, and tapes carried through the BlackBox store.

hero.title: Distro
hero.intro: A small curated layer around the store: records, clothes, and tapes that fit naturally beside the releases BlackBox is already putting into the world.

group_intros.Vinyl 12-inch: Full-size records worth keeping in circulation: BlackBox releases, close allies, and a few things that still belong on an actual shelf.
group_intros.Vinyl 7-inch: Seven-inch records and split releases that fit the distro shelf without needing a separate archive.
group_intros.CDs: Compact disc editions carried as part of the same small, physical catalog.
group_intros.Clothes: Shirts and wearable pieces that feel closer to the label table than to generic merch filler.
group_intros.Tapes: Small-run cassette releases and tape editions that still make sense in a real distro, not just as a novelty format.
group_intros.Other: Fallback shelf for physical distro pieces that do not fit the main format groups.
